title: Improved board export experience!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have improved the board export experience

Why?

In response to feedback we had received concerning the board export process, particularly regarding export wait time and errors that occurred during the activity, we decided to make the necessary adjustments to refine the experience while setting clear expectations about the export time and the potential for error.

The improvement to this process addresses all three board states - small board export, significant board export, and a failed board export. Cast your eyes to the visuals below to see the export process in action across the three different board states.

All things boards 👀 (3)3250×2600 249 KB

To note: In all cases, the exported file will be downloaded to the desktop and sent as an email.

It’s important for us to hear your feedback! Let us know what you think of this update in the comments below, and what you’d like to see next

posts.author: josephmack (Joseph Mack)
posts.cookedHtml: We are Real Estate company. I read your website’s content on daily basis. I really very enjoyed.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks so much for your feedback! We’re so glad you’re loving the content

posts.author: josephmack (Joseph Mack)
posts.cookedHtml: Always Welcome BiancaT

posts.author: Victoria_Martinez (Victoria Martinez)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be wonderful to also have the possibility of adding an export automation.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: We love this idea! Share it here so it can get greater visibility - Submit an Idea - monday Community Forum

posts.author: HopeM (Hope McCorkle)
posts.cookedHtml: It has already been submitted: Automation for Board Exported to Excel and Emailed - #3 by ll4mat

posts.author: egronberger (Erik Gronberger)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if we could automate this process. So many automations, integrations, etc., triggered by so many conditions. Why is it that we can´t just set a daily/weelky/monthly automation to export and email dashboard information. Reporting is crucial for every company, and email is still one of the main communication channels.

Thanks
